name: Pineapple Upside-Down French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a saucepan, melt butter over moderate heat and stir in sugar and pineapple until the sugar is dissolved.
3. In a shallow bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and salt.
4. Spread the pineapple mixture evenly over the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
5. Dip bread slices into the milk mixture in batches and arrange them in one layer on top of the pineapple mixture.
6. Bake in the middle of the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown.
7. Cool the pan for 1 minute before serving.
